policy: $25 emissions charge with dividend and transition
10% Medicare Advantage benchmark reduction with continuity protections
common_package.protections: VAT credit, emissions dividend and transition, defense workforce transition, Medicare access and continuity, rights and appeals
common_package.uncertainty: formal joint fiscal, distributional, service, legal, and implementation scores pending

cards.marginal_change: add a 3-point AGI surtax above $100,000 single and $200,000 joint, indexed, plus full-rate current taxation of foreign income of U.S. corporations
cards.principal_payers_or_exposure: higher-income filers and affected multinational owners, workers, and stakeholders
cards.correction_rule: surtax may move only between 2.5 and 3.5 points, no more than 0.25 point per year; corporate changes are not automatic

cards.marginal_change: no additional tax or program change; choose the partial rather than primary-balance fiscal target
cards.principal_payers_or_exposure: future taxpayers and service users through higher debt and interest pressure
cards.correction_rule: no automatic tax or service change; central excess serves only as forecast reserve

presentation_rule: Show the common package once, render every listed field in the same order and prominence, and randomize card order during comprehension testing.
